spec.name: Forcebeam
spec.summary: A spell that counters effects using force magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that counters effects using force magic. A square counter/create recipe that channels force discipline into kinetic output. It applies a beam pattern against surface across self reach with immediate persistence.
